name: support-storm
description: Simulate the support emails, reviews, and complaints a launch will generate, then identify product fixes that cut maintenance drag.

interface.shortDescription: Simulate the support emails, reviews, and complaints a launch will generate, then identify product fixes that cut maintenance drag.
interface.longDescription: Simulate the support emails, reviews, and complaints a launch will generate, then identify product fixes that cut maintenance drag. Works well in repo-local and Codex cloud workflows that operate on a checked-out repository.
defaultPrompt: Simulate the support emails, bug reports, reviews, and refund requests this launch or feature change is likely to generate.
